sections.description: Member management for parents' associations (ANPA/AMPA) on WordPress: passwordless member area, children and extracurricular enrolment, encrypted SEPA banking, season lifecycle, native WordPress admin screens, and self-hosted updates from GitHub.
sections.changelog:
1.32.0

  • Reorganiza Axustes en subseccións nativas para Xeral, Cursos e Mantemento.
  • Engade control de apertura/peche de matrículas por curso sen alterar estado nin datas.
  • Engade páxina nativa de wp-admin para Xestión ANPA, reutilizando o panel existente e mantendo a autenticación master forte.

1.31.0

  • Multi-tenant cleanup, localization settings, and GitHub self-updates.

1.24.0

  • Self-hosted updates from the public repository (plugin-update-checker, JSON metadata mode).
